Title: AWS Access Key ID discovered
Description: AWS Access Key ID discovered in JavaScript
Recommendation: Immediately revoke and rotate exposed credentials. Use a vault solution.

Title: Sensitive file exposed: .env
Description: Environment file containing potential secrets and configuration
Recommendation: Remove sensitive files from the web root. Store credentials outside the document root.

Title: Information disclosure via Server header
Description: Web server software and version disclosed
Recommendation: Configure the web server to suppress verbose headers.
